title: Setting Up Integration Testing Environment Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on integration testing environment setup.

questions.question: Regarding the testing of software, what is an 'Integration Testing Environment' used for?
options: To collect and analyze data from the database
To provide a controlled, isolated, and predictable environment for testing how different components of your software work together

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a integration-testing-environment-setup workflow?
options: Automating the creation of a consistent test environment—such as via Docker—for all developers on a project
Recording a commit directly to the SQL database
Its only possible for SQL repositories
